🌾 Our Farm School · Manvel, TX

This Is Not a Concept.
This Is Already Here.

Real land. Real animals. Real children learning in the real world. Our Farm School exists — and it is more beautiful than any brochure could ever show. These are our actual grounds. These are our actual children.

"The land is the classroom. The animals are the teachers. And every child who walks through that gate leaves a little more rooted than when they arrived."

— Skye Parapat, Founder · Legacies Learning Villages

What Our Farm Has

Everything a child needs
to grow.

Our farm is not a field trip. It is the daily environment where our children learn, explore, and become themselves — every morning.

🌳

Wide Open Land

Acres of green space, towering Texas trees, open meadows, and sky as far as you can see. Room to run, breathe, and be fully alive.

🐐

Farm Animals

Goats, chickens, and more — children greet them every morning as part of daily routine. Animal care is life science in action.

🌾

Garden & Growing Space

We plant, tend, harvest, and eat what we grow. Farm-to-table isn't a concept here — it is Tuesday.

🏠

The Farmhouse

A warm, shaded structure on the grounds — our base for circle time, reading, art, and rainy-day learning.

🌲

Nature Trails

Shaded paths through trees for daily nature walks, insect discovery, leaf collection, and the kind of science that only happens outside.

☀️

Texas Sky

Weather observation, shadow tracking, cloud watching — the sky is part of our science curriculum every single day.

This is where
your child belongs.

Every child who has stood at that fence, looked a goat in the eye, or run across that grass has learned something no worksheet could ever teach. This is real education. It is already here — waiting for your family.

"I built this because my own children needed it. They are the founding students. This land was their first classroom. Now we are opening the gate — and inviting your family in."
